response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google. However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor (Principal Engineer) requiring 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products/platforms. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no advanced degree, and no demonstrated track record of building or leading AI/ML products, platforms, or strategic AI initiatives at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent AI-adjacent work at Google on MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform or product leadership — role requires recognized AI expertise
Experience level and scope below Director/Principal IC bar; lacks strategic advisory or executive-facing work
No advanced degree in AI and limited cloud-platform strategy experience versus preferred profile

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Director-level Principal IC
